title: Articles of impeachment filed against Trump. Why it's a longshot

title: Bill Gates latest to face congressional scrutiny in Epstein files
shortDescription: Tech billionaire Bill Gates is the latest high-profile name to testify before Congress about his connections to Jeffrey Epstein.

title: White House says Strait of Hormuz is not closed
shortDescription: Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt responded to a question about Iranian media reports that the Strait of Hormuz is closed, saying they are false.

title: White House: Lebanon ‘not included’ in ceasefire
shortDescription: The White House says Lebanon is not included in the current ceasefire deal, as Israeli airstrikes in the country killed at least 112 people.

title: Historian group sues Trump saying recordkeeping is constitutional
shortDescription: The lawsuit challenges a recent memorandum from the Department of Justice declaring the decades-old Presidential Records Act is unconstitutional.

title: Republicans keep House seat in Georgia. The campaigns won't slow down
shortDescription: Trump-endorsed Republican Clay Fuller won a special election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene in Georgia. He still has to win a primary and midterm.

title: What does Trump have to do with taco Tuesday? Social jabs explained
shortDescription: President Donald Trump opted not to bomb Iran last night after a threatening post on Easter. Now people are saying "Trump TACO." What does it mean?

title: The first movement in months, trademark filed for Trump Mobile plan

title: Why a US rival and a neighbor at war intervened in Iran
